title: The Sin Flood
writer: Frank Allen, Henning Berger, J.G. Hawks
actors: Richard Dix, Helene Chadwick, James Kirkwood
plot: Stratton's café is a popular place with the people of Cottonia, a wealthy cotton town on the banks of the Mississippi, installs flood-proof doors as a safeguard against an overflow of the river; when a flood comes, it appears that...
